message: The designated place was a cheap hotel room located on Avenue A.
I felt a bit hesitant about going to such a place, but it can't be helped for Guy's information.
I decided to think that way.
But what does Ginny know? She might be Eva's informant.
I lightly knock on the door of the intended room.
To my surprise, Ginny was sitting on the bed in her underwear.
I found myself at a loss where to look.
I wanted to ask about Guy.
Yes, I know that you came to talk about that.
It's hard to look when you're dressed like that.
That's fine, I'd love to see you lose control of your reason.
You want to know about Guy, right? Then let's talk comfortably on the bed.
I decide to accept Ginny's invitation to get the information.
Since I'm not interested, I decline Ginny's invitation.
Got it. I'll take my time listening to you in bed.
Oh, I'm so happy. I've liked you since the moment I saw you.
Come on, let’s make a toast in bed. To our meeting.
Ginny takes off her underwear and unabashedly exposes her beautiful, white naked body.
A sweet scent faintly wafts from her body, tickling my nostrils.
Come on, come sit next to me.
Come on, let's feel even better.
I feel like Ginny's voice is coming from somewhere far away.
And somehow, my body feels hot.
My body felt like it belonged to someone else.
Lost in the moment, I sank my teeth into Ginny’s body lying in front of me and hugged her greedily.
It was an intensity I had never experienced before, as if another personality had taken over me.
I had completely forgotten my initial purpose of getting information from Guy, and was simply drowning in sex with the beautiful woman named Ginny.
My head was spinning, and I felt nothing but desire for sex.
The sweet scent excites feelings and compels her body even more intensely.
I felt like I had turned into a mere beast, moving my body according to my desires.
Ahhh, you’re more wonderful than any man.
Before I knew it, I was standing alone in the middle of the street.
My head felt strangely heavy, and my whole body was enveloped in lethargy.
What on earth was I here for?
I'm sorry, I can't go along with your invitation.
feeling that my old bad habits are catching up with me, and I might be a
No way, am I an AIDS carrier?!
No, I'm scared and haven't gone to get tested yet.
I think you should go quickly for the test. I have to be careful because of my job.
Well, if I'm found out, there's nothing I can do. Yes, I'm a woman from the Escort Service.
What do you mean by Escort Service?
So, was Tony Ford a client?
? Well, technically he is a client, but it feels a bit off.
It’s kind of hard to understand.
I don’t really need to explain this, right?
Yeah. Just tell me about Guy.
This room is an incredibly cramped single room, with just a small table and chair besides a semi-double bed.
For a hotel located in a place called Avenue A, it looks surprisingly clean.
It seems Ginny plans to talk to me while she's in just her underwear.
For her as an escort service, it might be a uniform style, but it's hard to know where to look.
She’s waiting for my words while sipping champagne.
It's about time for my medication to run out.
I thought I'd feel really good.
I ended up just drinking out of habit.
You seem like you were raised well, so you must hate stuff like this, right?
You used to have those days of being hooked on drugs, right? Guy mentioned that.
Guy told you even that much?
He really has a loose tongue, doesn't he? Hehe.
Actually, my old friend got his wrist cut and was murdered.
So you see, I can’t get by without taking drugs.
You said you know a lot about Guy.
Have you read the gossip article from BAM?
The BAM article? The one about Guy?
Yeah, it recently featured an article about Guy's private life.
Sorry, but I'm not the one who provided that information.
Ask me anything while I'm in a good mood.
What kind of acquaintance do you have with Guy?
Well, I work for an Escort Service.
Yeah, more or less. He feels like a client.
Are you shocked to learn that side of Guy?
Did Guy share everything with you?
I don't know what 'everything' means, but he probably shared quite a bit.
But I don't think that means trust or anything like that. It's easy to spill secrets in bed, you know.
Haven't you heard anything about Guy's travel plans?
I haven't heard anything about him going on a trip.
First of all, it's not the time for a contract renewal. It seems there's also a movie shoot.
Yeah, that's it. He's skipping the shoot and off traveling.
That's odd. He was so looking forward to being in the movie.
I wonder why he'd go on a trip at a time like this, you know?
I don’t know him personally. But I think Guy knew about the article in advance.
Because he said something like that.
It's a bit hard to say.
I just want to hear anything, really.
Actually, I was wondering what Kristy would think when she saw the article, you know? Kristy's his fiancée, right?
It seems Guy knew the content of the article before it came out. But I don’t know who told him.
It seems like he was worried about the article.
I don't think he showed any signs of that.
But maybe he was just putting on a brave face in front of me.
I don't know anything more than that.
All I know is that Kristy is his fiancée and they're not getting along.
Do you remember when things started not going well?
I think it was only in the past few months that it became so clear. Still, it seems there were plenty of complaints before that.
Isn't she a well-bred lady? Did she mention feeling constrained in various ways?
So when you say she feels constrained, you're talking about Guy?
Yes. When you get down to it, it's just nagging or something like that.
They just seemed tired. Maybe it was a long spring.
Tony Ford is also one of the clients. I really wanted to meet you at a nice hotel, but I wouldn't want him to find out.
So, does that mean Tony is pretty jealous?
Not exactly, but he wanted to be in a relationship with you.
I think he can't tolerate that.
I don't really get what you mean.
Isn't Tony's situation irrelevant right now?
